/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/transform_buffer_test.dir/tests/transform_buffer.cpp.o -o transform_buffer_test  libproject4.a ../lib/linux-aarch64/libproject3.a ../lib/linux-aarch64/libproject2.a ../lib/linux-aarch64/libproject1.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
